en_title: Star Trek 4: The Voyage Home 40th Anniversary Re-Release Confirmed for the UK
cn_title: 《星际迷航4：抢救未来》40周年重映定档英国
subtitle: 老船员返航
opus_summary: 《星际迷航4：抢救未来》将于2026年9月4日在英国影院重映，纪念影片上映40周年及《星际迷航》系列60周年。目前尚未确认其他地区是否会同步重映。

paragraphs.en: Admiral Kirk and Spock are Earth-bound once more, as Star Trek 4: The Voyage Home is set to return to theaters for its 40th anniversary.
paragraphs.cn: Kirk上将和Spock又要回到地球了。《星际迷航4：抢救未来》将为上映40周年重返影院。

paragraphs.en: Artist Matt Ferguson created a poster to commemorate the announcement, as shared by Empire . The reveal promises to bring stars William Shatner (Kirk) and Leonard Nimoy (Spock) back to the big screen starting September 4, 2026, with tickets for the classic '80s film on sale now.
paragraphs.cn: 据Empire分享，艺术家Matt Ferguson为这次公布创作了一张纪念海报。这次重映将从2026年9月4日起，让William Shatner饰演的Kirk和Leonard Nimoy饰演的Spock重返大银幕，这部80年代经典影片的门票现已开售。

paragraphs.en: It appears the Star Trek 4 re-release will be limited to UK cinemas upon its premiere later this year. For now, there is no confirmation of its return to theaters elsewhere.
paragraphs.cn: 从目前情况看，《星际迷航4》今年晚些时候的重映首轮只限英国影院。至于其他地区是否也会重映，目前尚未确认。

paragraphs.en: Star Trek IV: The Voyage Home is voyaging back to UK cinemas this September in celebration of the 40th anniversary of the film & the 60th anniversary of Star Trek.
paragraphs.cn: 《星际迷航4：抢救未来》将于今年9月驶回英国影院，以纪念影片上映40周年和《星际迷航》系列60周年。

paragraphs.en: I’m so happy I got to make new art to celebrate the re-release. More details soon about special screenings & more! pic.twitter.com/gdQj2qj2yE
paragraphs.cn: 我很高兴能为这次重映创作新海报。特别放映等更多细节很快公布！pic.twitter.com/gdQj2qj2yE

paragraphs.en: Star Trek 4 was directed by Nimoy and premiered in 1986. Alongside its 40th birthday arrives the overall franchise's 60th anniversary, with various festivities keeping Trekkies celebrating all year long. It all comes to a head on Star Trek Day, September 8.
paragraphs.cn: 《星际迷航4》由Nimoy执导，于1986年上映。在它迎来40周年的同时，整个《星际迷航》系列也迎来60周年，各类庆祝活动让粉丝一整年都有得忙。这一切将在9月8日的「星际迷航日」达到高潮。

paragraphs.en: "Using a Klingon ship, the crew of the Enterprise returns to 1980s Earth to retrieve two whales that may save the planet from destruction in their own era," an official description for Star Trek 4 says.
paragraphs.cn: 《星际迷航4》的官方简介写道：「企业号船员借助一艘克林贡飞船回到20世纪80年代的地球，寻找两头或许能在他们所处时代拯救地球免于毁灭的鲸鱼。」

paragraphs.en: Ferguson did his part to celebrate the franchise with Star Trek 4 but was also responsible for handling posters for the Star Trek 2: The Wrath of Khan and Star Trek 3: The Search for Spock anniversary releases, too. He looked back on his work as Star Trek celebrates 60.
paragraphs.cn: Ferguson这次用《星际迷航4》为系列庆生，此前也曾负责《星际迷航2：可汗怒吼》和《星际迷航3：寻找Spock》周年重映版海报。在《星际迷航》庆祝60周年之际，他也回顾了自己的相关创作。

paragraphs.en: Star Trek 4: The Voyage Home will descend onto theaters once more this September. While we wait to see if the re-release may come to other locations, you can read IGN's 8/10 review of its collector's edition.
paragraphs.cn: 《星际迷航4：抢救未来》将于今年9月再次登陆影院。在等待这次重映是否扩展到其他地区时，你也可以阅读IGN为其收藏版给出的8分评测。
